_note: V3 DEPTH LAYERS: each cubby holds a STACK of layers (rows). layers[0]=FRONT (visible+interactive), layers behind = HIDDEN goods that peek over the top and reveal when the front layer empties. Empty workspace cubbies use layers:[[]] (an empty front layer). Backward-compat: a cubby with flat items:[...] = a single front layer. Counts per type are multiples of 3 (5 types x6=30). 4 cubbies have 2 layers to demonstrate reveal; solvable.
